reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 예상치못했던 분홍털에 두녀석다환장을해서 아침부터아주 레이스를펼쳤네요ㅋ 다른것들도 반응이좋아서 세트구성으로샀는데 필요없는게없어 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I didn't expect the pink fur, but both of my cats went crazy and we had quite the playtime this morning 😂 The other items got great reactions too, so I bought the set bundle and there's nothing unnecessary in it—love it!

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 리필로 구입해서 집에 있는 막대기에 연결해 놀아주는데 정말 좋아하네용.. 깃털에 진심인 냥이들은 정말 좋아할 것 같아요! 리필 구성으로 5가지 장난감을 얻은거에 만족합니당~ 다음에도 바잇미 제작 다른 종류 리필팩 구매할거에용
reviews.content_en: I bought the refill and connected it to the stick wand I already have at home, and they absolutely love it! Cats who are really into feathers will definitely love this! I'm so happy with getting 5 different toys from the refill pack~ I'm definitely buying other types of BITE ME refill packs next time too

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content:
모두 다 내꺼야~~!!우리 막둥이 픽!!
형님 누나 모두 비켜 다 내꺼야!!너무 신나서 으르렁 노래까지!!리필팩 하나로 삼냥이들 모두 해피했어요
reviews.content_en: It's all mine~~!! My youngest's pick!! Everyone else out of the way, it's all mine!! They got so excited they even growled and sang!! One refill pack made all three of my cats happy 🐱

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content: 애기들이 너무 좋아해서 하루만에 박살이 났지만 또 사야겠어옹 핑크 깃털을 젤 좋아해영 줄같응 것두
reviews.content_en: My babies loved it so much that it fell apart in just one day, but I gotta buy more 😆 They especially love the pink feathers, and the string toy too!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 구성이 다양하고 튼튼해서 바꿔가며 놀아주니 너무 좋아하네요^^
reviews.content_en: The variety of options is great and it's sturdy, so rotating them keeps my cats super happy ^^

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 가성비 너무 좋네요 잘가지고 놀고 있어요^^
reviews.content_en: The value for money is amazing. They play with it well ^^

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 새장난감에만 격하게 반응하는 냥이라 리필을 가끔 주문하는데 역시..뜯자마자 급관심을 보이네요.
reviews.content_en: My cat only responds intensely to bird toys, so I occasionally order refills, and as expected... they showed immediate interest the moment I opened it.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
여러가지 재미가 있어서 질릴때면 돌려주면 됩니다
최애는 수술같은거 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: There's lots of different fun things, so when they get bored, you can just rotate them back in. My favorite is when they go for the string-like ones

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
다른 사이트에서 사던 리필이랑 가격은 비슷한데
크기가 더 크네요 만족!!!!!! 열심히 놀아주고 또 구입할게요 든든합니닷
reviews.content_en: The price is similar to what I buy from other sites, but the size is bigger here. Satisfied!!!!! They'll play with it a lot and I'll definitely order again soon

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content: 자동 장난감 마니 사줬는데 새거를 얼마나 좋아하시는지~신난 모습보니까 뿌듯하네요♡
reviews.content_en: I bought a lot of automatic toys, but they love the new one so much~ seeing them have so much fun makes me feel proud ♡

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
택배뜯자마자 가지고 놀아서 회전깃털 벌써 망가졋네요ㅠㅠ
고양이가 엄청 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: As soon as I opened the package, my cat started playing with it and the spinning feather is already broken ㅠㅠ But my cat absolutely loves it!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 둘째 오고나서 장난감이 금방 망가져서 리필팩을 구매했어요 여기서도 하난 벌써 망가졌지만 여러개 들어있어서 좋아요 애들도 신상이라 좋아해요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: After the second cat arrived, toys break so quickly so I bought a refill pack. One's already broken here too, but since there are multiple pieces I like it 😊 The kittens love the new toys too!

reviews.name: 빈****
reviews.content: 오랜만에 신나서 뛰어다니는 모습을 봤어요. 깃털이 정말 나방이 움직이는 것 같아 아이가 엄청 신나하네요
reviews.content_en: I haven't seen my cat running around excitedly in a while. The feather really looks like a moth moving, and my cat is so thrilled about it!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 리필용 사용중..깃털종류 너무 잘 뜯겨요 퓨ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Using the refill pack.. the feathers fall off way too easily ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 우리 냥이들이 너무나 좋아합니다! 최고에용!
reviews.content_en: My kitties absolutely love this! It's the best! 🐱

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
리필이여서 간편하고 보관하기도 좋아요
반응이 엄청좋진 않은데..계속 써볼게요
근데 종이에 방울 달린거 3초만에 떨어졌어유ㅜ
종이는 좀 허접한거같애요
다른걸로 바꿔주심이ㅜ
reviews.content_en: The refill is convenient and easy to store. The response isn't amazing though.. I'll keep trying it. But the bell attached to the paper fell off in just 3 seconds ㅜ The paper quality seems a bit cheap. Would be great if you could swap it out ㅜ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
반응이 뛰어나서 좋았어요!
나머지는 리필재품이 많었으년 좋겠어요!
reviews.content_en: Great reaction from my cat! Wish there were more refill items included though!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 잘가지고 놀아요 다양해서 번갈아가며 놀아주기 좋네요
reviews.content_en: My cat plays with it well. Since there's variety, it's great to alternate between different toys for playtime!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 퀄리티 좋고 잘놀아요 좋네요
reviews.content_en: Good quality and my cat plays with it well. Love it!

reviews.name: 염****
reviews.content:
깃털, 방울, 끈, 쥐돌이 요런거 좋아하는 애라 사봤어요
아직 못달아봤는데 포장된거만 흔들어도 좋아하긴함
reviews.content_en: My cat likes feathers, bells, strings, and mouse toys so I got this. Haven't attached it yet, but just shaking it in the package already gets her excited!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 깃털사랑 로또에요 아직 가지고 놀진않았지만 비닐상태에서두 관심을 보이고있어서 뜯으면 너무 좋아할것같아요
reviews.content_en: It's a lottery win for feather lovers! My cat hasn't played with it yet, but she's already showing interest in the packaging, so I think she'll love it once I open it 😊

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 고양이들이 좋아할거 같아요~!  리필팩 여러가지 구입해서 지루하지않게 바꿔줘가면서 놀아줘야겠어요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I think the cats will love it~! I bought several refill packs so I can switch them out and keep playtime fresh and fun ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 가성비 갑 장난감 세트입니다 아이들이 좋아해요! 특히 분홍색 깃털에 반응이 엄청나요! 너무 좋아해서 하룻밤만에 망가졌지만 만족입니다~~^^
reviews.content_en: This toy set is amazing value for money. My kids love it! They especially go crazy for the pink feathers! They loved it so much it broke overnight, but I'm totally satisfied~~^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바람개비 좋아할 줄 알았는데 역시 깃털파네요 그래도 다섯개중에 두개라도 쓰는게 어디냐..😂
reviews.content_en: I thought they'd like the pinwheel, but turns out they're feather fanatics 😂 Still, if even 2 out of 5 toys get used, that's something!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
캐치더마우스 사면서 리필팩도 구매했어용^^
아직 쓰진 않았지만 교체할때되면 잘 쓸께용ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought the CATCH THE MOUSE toy and got the refill pack too^^\nI haven't used it yet, but I'll use it well when it's time to replace it ㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 깃털 장난감 환장하는 애는 택배 뜯지마자 방울 소리에 달려나왔네요..종류 다양하고 색도 예뻐요 고양이가 좋아할거 같아요
reviews.content_en: My cat who goes crazy for feather toys came running the moment she heard the bell sound when the package arrived! There's a good variety and the colors are so pretty. I think your cat will love it 🎀

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content: 배송전엔 돌아가는 깃털을 제일 기대했는데 생각보다 후월후월 돌아가서 딱히 반응이 없네요ㅠ 핑크색 조개 젤 환장합니다
reviews.content_en: Before it arrived, I was most excited about the spinning feather toy, but it spins a bit slower than expected so my cat doesn't really react to it ㅠ She absolutely goes nuts for the pink shell toy instead!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 엄청 좋아하는 게 한가지씩은 있네요! 특히 저 타포린줄..너무 좋아한 나머지 약간 먹어버려서 엄청 걱정했어요ㅠㅠ 다행히 응가로 나왔지만 놀때 꼭 주의해서 봐야할 것 같습니다ㅜ
reviews.content_en: My cat really loves certain toys in this set! Especially that tarp string toy—she loved it so much she actually ate a bit of it and I was super worried ㅠㅠ Fortunately it came out in her poop, but I need to be really careful and supervise playtime ㅜ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 깃털이 약간 약하게 붙어있지만, 떨어지면 계속 붙여서 사용중입니다. 애들이 좋아해요. 가성비 짱인듯..
reviews.content_en: The feathers are attached a bit loosely, but I just keep reattaching them and the toys are still in use. My kids love them. The value for money is unbeatable..!

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content: 좋아하는것도 있고 안좋아하능것도 있네요ㅠㅠ 그래도 세트로 사니까 합리적인 가격이라 좋습니다 :)
reviews.content_en: There are some toys they like and some they don't ㅠㅠ But since I got the whole set, the price is really reasonable, so I'm happy :)

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
내구성은 좀 약한데.다양해서 좋아요
길다란걸 특히 좋아해요 저렴하게 다양한걸 구입해 만족스러워요
reviews.content_en: The durability is a bit weak, but I love the variety. My cat especially loves the long ones. I'm satisfied with getting various types at an affordable price.

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 두녀석이 사냥을 너무 잘해서 항상 리필이 필요한데 저렴히게  여러 종류 잘 샀어요
reviews.content_en: My two cats are really good hunters so we always need refills, but I got multiple types at a great price.

reviews.name: 보****
reviews.content: 요즘 흥미가 없어보여서 여러가지 종류로 구입해봤는데 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: My cat seemed uninterested lately, so I bought several different types and they love them so much!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
고양이가 깃털 좋아해서 구매햇어요
구성도 좋고 싸게 잘삿아요
reviews.content_en: My cat loves feathers so I bought this. The set is great and I got it for a good price.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 잘 갖고 놀아요ㅎ넘 격하게 놀아서 금방 ㅜ빠져요
reviews.content_en: They play with it well 😄 They play so intensely that it falls apart pretty quick 😢

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 팩에 들어있어서 보관도 편해요
reviews.content_en: Since it comes in a pack, it's convenient to store.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 회전깃털이 반응이 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: The rotating feather toy gets a great reaction.

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 아이들이 잘 놀아요~^^
reviews.content_en: The kids play with it really well~^^

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아할 것 같아서 오자마자 놀아줬는데 다 안노네요 ㅠㅠ 속상해요 장난감은 튼튼하고 좋아보입니다!
reviews.content_en: I thought they'd love it so much and played with them right when it arrived, but they're not interested at all 😢😢 That's disappointing. The toy itself looks sturdy and nice!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 저희 고양이는 안 좋아하네요. 그리고 장난감 꺼내는데 깃털 다 분리되고 쓰지도 못했어요.
reviews.content_en: My cat doesn't like it. Also, when I took the toy out, all the feathers separated and we couldn't even use it.

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 화면으로 볼때보다 크기가 많아 작고 빈약해요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It looks smaller and flimsy compared to how it appears on screen haha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 내구성 너무 약해요ㅜㅜ 몇 번 흔드니까 떨어짐..
reviews.content_en: The durability is really weak ㅜㅜ It falls apart after shaking it a few times..

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 깃털세트 고민하다가 구매했어요. 다른데에서 구매했다가 털빠지고 먹을까봐 노심초사 했는데 바잇미에서 구매한 깃털 세트는 아주 튼튼 하네요!!!
reviews.content_en: I was thinking about getting the feather set and decided to buy it. I was worried after buying from another place because the feathers shed and my cat might eat them, but the feather set from BITE ME is super sturdy!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이거쓰면서 알게된건데 정말 다양한 취향이 존재합니다
사냥놀이 다 좋아할줄알았는데 혹시나하며 이것저것껴보면서 테스트했더니 반응이 다 달랐어요!! 고양이는 참 신기한 동물이네요 ㅎㅎ 저희고양이는 작을수록 더 흥분하더라구요!!
reviews.content_en: I learned something while using this - cats really do have diverse preferences! 😄 I thought my cat would like all kinds of hunting toys, but when I tested different ones just in case, she had completely different reactions!! Cats are truly fascinating creatures haha Our cat gets more excited the smaller the toy is!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
즤집냥반은 소프트 파스텔페더랑 회전페더를
선호하십니다 쫄보라 그런지 작고 팔랑팔랑 거리는걸 좋아하는거같아요 종이는 관심도없어요 호엥
파스텔페더만 더 구입하고싶어요요요옹
reviews.content_en: Our home kitty prefers the soft pastel feather and spinning feather. I think she likes small and fluttery things because she's a scaredy-cat haha She doesn't care about the paper ones at all 😹 I want to buy more of just the pastel feathers!!

reviews.name: 짜****
reviews.content: 냥이가 좋아해요. 장난감에 싫증이 빠르고 놀다가도 흥미를 빨리 잃는 편인데 이 깃털은 좋아해요. 담에 추가구매 할게요- ㅎ
reviews.content_en: My cat loves it. She normally gets bored with toys quickly and loses interest while playing, but she really likes this feather toy. I'll buy more next time! ㅎ

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content: 장난감 구매 할때마다 이렇게 리필이 있으면 좋겠다고 생각했는데,, 드뎌 찾았네요^^ 냥이들도 아주 좋아합니다!
reviews.content_en: Every time I buy toys, I wish they had refills like this,, and I finally found it^^ My cats love it so much!

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content:
와
별 기대도 없었는데 꼬맹이가 아주 날아다닙니다!
환장템 등극이랄까 ㅎㅎ
강추합니다
reviews.content_en: Wow, I didn't have high expectations but my little one is flying all over the place! 😄 This is the ultimate must-have toy haha Highly recommend!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 엄청좋아하네요 잘샀어요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: She loves it so much! Great purchase haha

reviews.name: ㄷ****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아하네요 잘샀어요
reviews.content_en: She loves it so much! Great purchase
